---
title: "Your Poster Title"
subtitle: "Optional subtitle line"
author:
  - name: "First Author"
    affiliation: "Department, Institution"
  - name: "Second Author"
    affiliation: "Department, Institution"
brand: _brand.yml
format:
  academic-poster-typst:
    # Start with a preset, then override only what this poster needs.
    poster-preset: results-first
    # Paper: a preset ("a0", "a1", "a2") or "WxH<unit>" like "48x36in", "56x31.5in"
    poster-size: 48x36in
    margin:
      x: 0.6in
      y: 0.5in
    footer-center: "Conference Name 2026"
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

::: {.poster-column}

# Background

Replace this paragraph with the motivation for your work.

# Methods

- Bullet 1
- Bullet 2
- Bullet 3

:::

::: {.poster-column .poster-feature}

# Key Findings {.inverse}

::: {.poster-callout .large}
Your main result in one sentence.
:::

<!-- Drop a figure here, e.g. ![](figures/main-result.png){width=100%} -->

:::

::: {.poster-column}

# Results

A short paragraph summarizing the findings.

# Discussion

What it means and what's next.

:::
